title: Beta Deaths
description: Plugin that adds death messages to b1.7.3
body:
## Death Messages for b1.7.3!

> Very useful for Survival servers!

| Command      |    Description     |        Permission |
|:-------------|:------------------:|------------------:|
| `betadeaths` | Reloads the plugin | betadeaths.reload |

## What is this?

A CraftBukkit plugin that adds death messages (yes, the ones that appear when you die in newer versions) to older Minecraft versions. You can change every single death message, it also supports formatting codes!
